name: Blue-Cornmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, blend milk, sugar, baking powder, cornmeal, and flour.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add oil, egg whites, and vanilla to the well.
4. Mix with a wire whisk until smooth.
5. Pour batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto a lightly greased griddle or non-stick skillet.
6. Bake until browned underneath, then flip and bake on the other side.
7. Each serving contains about: 489 calories; 235 mg sodium; 126 mg cholesterol; 29 grams fat; 49 grams carbohydrates; 9 grams protein; 0.18 gram fiber.
Source: El Tovar Lodge in South Rim Grand Canyon, Arizona
Serve with honey or molasses - or any syrup.
